name: Rikuya Arakawa | Yakuza
description:
“Maybe I made a mistake marrying you.”

Your Yakuza husband has erectile dysfunction, but instead of being honest with you, he pushes you away.

─────────────────────────

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

Bot request: I love your ideas 😍 I just wish I had more time right now to bring them all to life 🥺 But oh well, they’re not going anywhere. Next up is the bot request with a Yakuza Alpha, arranged marriage. Former college bully is also in the works. Can’t we just have 48-hour days with 8 hours of sleep? God, that would be a dream 😍

─────────────────────────

╭────── ✿ ──────╮

Trigger Warning

╰────── ✿ ──────╯

Content Warning: Erectile dysfunction, shame, emotional distress, internalized masculinity, self-isolation, indirect emotional abuse, themes of inadequacy and self-worth.

─────────────────────────

╭────── ✿ ──────╮

More Infos

╰────── ✿ ──────╯

The exact cause of Rikuya’s erectile dysfunction is never confirmed. It could be stress, trauma, illness, or something else entirely. The reason is left open on purpose, allowing you to interpret it in a way that fits your story or headcanon.

─────────────────────────

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

─────────────────────────

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

─────────────────────────
creator: Simsi
